examples: He was invariably willing to discuss the possibilities hypothetically.
I mean, hypothetically a bond trading $0.60 on the dollar with an 8% coupon, a five-year bond that's yielding about 18%.
I am, of course, speaking hypothetically.
Hypothetically any artwork could be beamed into every apartment from Brooklyn to Kalamazoo.
With Mr. Ryan hypothetically on the ticket, the lead narrowed to a single point.
